query:
SELECT c.name as country, COUNT(pcr.id) as postal_code_ranges
FROM countries c
LEFT JOIN regions r ON r.countryId = c.id
LEFT JOIN postal_code_ranges pcr ON pcr.regionId = r.id
WHERE c.code IN ('BE', 'FR', 'DE', 'ES', 'NL')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY c.name;
